summary: 4th distinct todo blocked by the same collab-layer worktree-path-resolution bug (see escalations 662af585/490052cf/783665aa). Todo '[BUG] Worker permission-prompt stalls dont escalate + worker tmux unreachable from UI' exists in main .collab/todos.db (in_progress) but worktree-local todos.db has 0 rows; server serves get_todo from the empty worktree DB. No worker with cwd=worktree can read/complete; fix is server-side path resolution.
